assets.purpose: 11 blocking gates the Guardian enforces on a hub-and-spoke orchestration plan: fan-out justification, fresh_session isolation, last_message_only, AgentDefinition+Task dispatch, minimal provisioning, typed errors, valid_empty vs access_failure, local recovery, degraded aggregation, validation flags, and governance.
Legible mirror of quality-rubric.json to validate an orchestration plan by hand or as the validation section of the deliverable.
